messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Was the Symposium actually written by Socrates himself?

No, the Symposium (會飲篇) was not written by Socrates. It was written by Plato. Socrates left no written works — he taught entirely through spoken dialogue. Plato, his student, wrote the Symposium as a literary and philosophical dialogue in which Socrates appears as a character. While Socrates' voice is prominent in the text, Plato is the author to whom it is attributed.
